concerns.text: The 'ENCODE Multiomic' dataset cited (URL: huggingface.co/datasets/flxclxc/encoded_drug_reviews/...) is semantically inappropriate for the research question. The dataset name and filename explicitly indicate 'drug_reviews' (text/sentiment data), not multiomic genomic data (RNA-seq/DNase-seq). Using a text review dataset to predict gene expression from chromatin accessibility is impossible; the modality and data structure do not match the biological requirements of the spec.

The 'TSS Coordinates' dataset cited (URL: huggingface.co/datasets/zirui3/TSSB-3M-ext/...) appears to be a text-based dataset (TSSB-3M is a known bug-report dataset), not a genomic coordinate reference. The plan assumes this JSONL contains 'gene_id' and 'tss_start/tss_end' genomic coordinates, but the source is unrelated to genomics. The pipeline will fail to map peaks to TSS windows as the data will not contain the required genomic schema.
